blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: The bracket. Two synthetic fibers in the paint scrape. Dark colored. Athletic clothing, most likely.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Working on it. One member suggested the trip. Another handled the actual reservation — viewed the property listing seventeen times. The exterior photo gallery, three times.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: They were looking at the window.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: I'm reclassifying. Homicide investigation as of tonight.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: I'll be at the house tomorrow. Eight o'clock. I'd like you available.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I'll be next door. Inspector — the phone call. Whatever you found in those records. You're going to need to tell me soon.
He sat in the dark for a long moment. The ocean outside. The lit windows of the house next door — every room on, like the five people inside were afraid of what darkness might let them think about.
One of them booked that house. Looked at that window. Counted on a locked door and a twenty-foot drop to close the case. They planned every detail of this.
He turned back to the legal pad. He had work to do.
